metadata.name: Report a Change in Income for Benefits

description: A citizen receiving SNAP benefits has gotten a new job and needs to report their change in income.

nodes.task_description: Identify the citizen and their benefits case.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the active SNAP case.

nodes.task_description: Collect the new income information and supporting documentation (e.g., pay stubs).

expected_outcome.value: Agent accurately documents the new income details.

nodes.task_description: Recalculate the citizen's benefit amount based on the new income.

expected_outcome.value: The system recalculates the benefits, resulting in a lower monthly amount.

nodes.task_description: Inform the citizen of their new benefit amount and the date it becomes effective.

expected_outcome.value: Agent clearly communicates the change to the citizen.
